textByHashes.711313e1154b94ec70650fbaf1cacc1f72bc3ee8: You're the one that saved us. Thank you.
textByHashes.3fe5b3b7ba07e676f61eec5b74bd5132e46a4c80: He was deeper inside. Those... things... they dragged him away!
textByHashes.fec198a0d69d66126236fb70ec1bbe70224a68e4: He was deeper inside that cave. Those... things... they dragged him away!
